abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Kinetic Absorption
abilities.text: If this model does not have an Impact token, reduce damage dealt to it by 1. Then, this model gains an Impact token.

actions.name: Charge-Up Punch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, this model gains an Impact token.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Kinetic Grenade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove an Impact token to receive a (t).
actions.effects: Enemy models within (t)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Concussion Rush
triggers.text: When resolving, this model may move through enemy models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Lethal Aura
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.
